§6Wooden Crank§f

§aManual power for the early-game Quartz Grindstone.§f

The §bWooden Crank§f provides rotational power to the §bQuartz Grindstone§f. Right-click the crank repeatedly to grind items, or attach it to the grindstone's side for continuous operation.

§6How It Works§f:
§b•§f Right-click processes one item per click
§b•§f Attach to a §9grindstone side§f for continuous (but slow) operation
§b•§f The crank has limited durability and will eventually break
§b•§f Craft spares in advance

§6Strategic Role§f:
The Wooden Crank is the §efirst automation option§f for processing Certus Quartz and other crystal materials into dusts. Useful before you unlock §brotational power from other tech mods§f.

§eTip§f: If your pack includes §bEnderIO / BuildCraft / TechReborn§f, connect the grindstone to a rotational power source for hands-free grinding. The Wooden Crank is mostly used as a §9bridge§f during the very early game.
